faq1_q: Can I switch between One-on-One and Group?
faq1_a: Yes! Switch formats between billing periods. We'll help you transition smoothly.
faq2_q: What's the difference between One-on-One and Group?
faq2_a: One-on-One: 60 minutes of undivided coach attention on your goals. Group: 90 minutes with 2–5 peers, real collaborative practice at a lower cost per person.
faq3_q: What if I'm a complete beginner?
faq3_a: We work with all levels. Your coach adapts every session to meet you exactly where you are.
faq4_q: What if I miss a session?
faq4_a: Reschedule within your package period — flexible rescheduling with 24-hour notice. No penalties.
faq5_a: Yes! Custom programmes with volume pricing, dedicated support, leadership reporting, and progress tracking.
